title: SOFTWARE LICENSE ENFORCEMENT ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 29.  SOFTWARE LICENSE ENFORCEMENT ACT

§1961.  Title

This Chapter shall be known as the Software License Enforcement Act.  

Acts 1984, No. 744, §1.
